chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1376 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection at flag-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.09.2025 Mr. Shazado Dreho, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Counsel for the petitioner would be satisfied on the disposal of this petition, if Chairman Complaint Redressal Committee is directed to decide the application available in the file at page No.37 dated 15.08.2025, within fifteen days. AAG concedes request of counsel for the petitioner. Accordingly instant petition is disposed of with directions to the Chairman Complaint Redressal Committee to decide the application within fifteen days in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
